title: MCP Agent
summary:
# 1. MCP 协议概述

## 1.1 MCP 的定义、目标和设计理念

### 什么是 MCP 协议

**Model Context Protocol (MCP)** 是由 Anthropic 设计的开放协议，专门用于连接 AI 助手与外部数据源和工具。MCP 的核心目标是为 AI Agent 提供一个标准化、安全且可扩展的方式来访问外部资源。

### 设计理念

MCP 协议遵循以下核心设计理念：

1. **标准化接口**：定义统一的消息格式和交互模式
1. **安全第一**：内置权限控制和数据隔离机制
1. **可扩展性**：支持自定义资源类型和工具扩展
1. **简单易用**

title: [PR] fix(Anthropic Chat Model Node): Add Timeout option and stop capping requests at undici's 300s default
summary:
## Summary

The Anthropic Chat Model node calls `getProxyAgent(baseURL)` without timeout options. When no HTTP proxy is configured, `getProxyAgent` returns `undefined`, so `fetch` falls back to undici's global dispatcher — whose default `headersTimeout`/`bodyTimeout` is **300 seconds**. Any Anthropi

title: [PR] fix(bash): treat linter/test-runner exit 1 as reported output, not an error
summary:
## What & why

Linters and test-runners (ruff, eslint, tsc, pytest, jest, vitest, mypy, flake8, prettier) exit with code 1 to report violations/failures, but the Bash tool's default command semantics flag any non-zero exit as a tool error. The model then retries the identical command ~3× and "fails"
